html: I've been running it almost since launch on a 3090 (24gb vram), you really don't need that much. Second hand those are really cheap and i get 50-70 t/s (with MTP at 2), full ctx. IQ4_NL (unsloth) on this model seems suspiciously competent, and after the (by now not so recent) updates to q4 KV on llama.cpp, I just keep going back to it after dsv4pro disappointed me for the 100th time because it gave up on a task.
